name: tophant-clawvault-openclaw-alerts
description: Push high-risk ClawVault security events and daily security reports through OpenClaw agent messaging.
author: Tophant SPAI Lab

permissions_rationale.execute_command: Required to invoke openclaw agent messaging and manage the background alert daemon
permissions_rationale.write_files: Stores alert configuration, PID, deduplication state, and rate-limit state under ~/.ClawVault/openclaw-alerts/
permissions_rationale.read_files: Reads local alert configuration and daemon state
permissions_rationale.network: Reads local ClawVault dashboard REST API endpoints

start.description: Start background high-risk security event monitoring.

status.description: Show alert daemon and delivery status.

send-test.description: Send a test notification through OpenClaw.

run-once.description: Poll ClawVault once and send eligible high-risk alerts.

daily-report.description: Generate and send today's ClawVault security report.
